{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hotel Receptionist",
  "description": "Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Greet guests warmly and professionally on arrival and departure.
	Manage check-in and check-out processes efficiently, ensuring accuracy in guest records and billing.
	Handle reservations, room assignments, and guest inquiries via phone, email, and in person.
	Provide information about hotel services, local attractions, transportation, and dining options.
	Maintain accurate records of guest accounts, payments, and room availability.
	Resolve guest complaints promptly and escalate issues to the supervisor when necessary.
	Coordinate with housekeeping and maintenance to ensure rooms are ready for guests.
	Operate the hotel&rsquo;s front office systems (PMS) and maintain updated data.
	Handle cash, credit card transactions, and prepare shift reports accurately.
	Uphold hotel policies, grooming standards, and service quality at all times.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 1 - 2 years of work experience.
	Candidate should reside within the Ojodu, Ogba, Ketu, and Agege axis.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrteam@hotelcapitol.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Hotel Capitol"
    
  },

      "minValue": 0,

    }

}



Hotel Receptionist Job at Hotel Capitol




        
    

        
        Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Receptionist

Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet guests warmly and professionally on arrival and departure.
	Manage check-in and check-out processes efficiently, ensuring accuracy in guest records and billing.
	Handle reservations, room assignments, and guest inquiries via phone, email, and in person.
	Provide information about hotel services, local attractions, transportation, and dining options.
	Maintain accurate records of guest accounts, payments, and room availability.
	Resolve guest complaints promptly and escalate issues to the supervisor when necessary.
	Coordinate with housekeeping and maintenance to ensure rooms are ready for guests.
	Operate the hotel’s front office systems (PMS) and maintain updated data.
	Handle cash, credit card transactions, and prepare shift reports accurately.
	Uphold hotel policies, grooming standards, and service quality at all times.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 1 - 2 years of work experience.
	Candidate should reside within the Ojodu, Ogba, Ketu, and Agege axis.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Legal / Compliance Officer",
  "description": "Platform Finance Company Limited was incorporated in June 2022 and the institution is licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria. Platform Finance Company Limited is a financial institution that offers financial services such as loans, investments, assets financing, and financial advisory services. We provide our customers with quality services and investment solutions that meet their financial needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Legal / Compliance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Legal/Compliance Officer to manage the company&rsquo;s legal matters and ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements.
	The ideal candidate must have experience within a finance house and a good understanding of financial laws, corporate governance, and compliance frameworks.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Law (LL.B) with&nbsp;2&ndash;3 years post-call experience, preferably in a financial institution
	Called to the Nigerian Bar (BL)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations, corporate governance, and compliance frameworks
	Good understanding of regulatory bodies and reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical, communication, and negotiation skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Salary and&nbsp;Benefits


	N212,000 / Month (Net Pay), plus additional benefits
	Health Insurance (HMO)
	Pension Contribution
	PAYE Tax Compliance
	13th Month Salary
	Leave Allowance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;victoria.omokhoa@platformfinance.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.",

  },

Legal / Compliance Officer Job at Platform Finance Company Limited




        
    

        
        Platform Finance Company Limited was incorporated in June 2022 and the institution is licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria. Platform Finance Company Limited is a financial institution that offers financial services such as loans, investments, assets financing, and financial advisory services. We provide our customers with quality services and investment solutions that meet their financial needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Legal / Compliance Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Legal/Compliance Officer to manage the company’s legal matters and ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements.
	The ideal candidate must have experience within a finance house and a good understanding of financial laws, corporate governance, and compliance frameworks.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Law (LL.B) with 2–3 years post-call experience, preferably in a financial institution
	Called to the Nigerian Bar (BL)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations, corporate governance, and compliance frameworks
	Good understanding of regulatory bodies and reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical, communication, and negotiation skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Salary and Benefits


	N212,000 / Month (Net Pay), plus additional benefits
	Health Insurance (HMO)
	Pension Contribution
	PAYE Tax Compliance
	13th Month Salary
	Leave Allowance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical and Mechanical Draftman",
  "description": "Dumez Nigeria Limited, a&nbsp;Civil and Building Construction company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical and Mechanical Draftman

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Candidate will work with the MEP Director on a variety of projects using computer aided drafting (CAD) software.
	Candidate must be capable of preparing multiple view drawings, detail drawings, electrical ad Mechanical schematics, block diagrams and technical illustrations.
	Ability to organize complete system drawing packages. Drawings include complex design features that require considerable drafting skill and experience to visualize and portray.
	Must have the skills to review engineering drawings and designs to ensure adherence to established client specifications and standards.
	Up to date knowledge of commonly used concepts, practices, and procedures in Electrical/Mechanical drafting within the Construction industry.


Requirements
The candidate must:


	Have a Degree or its equivalent in Electrical Engineering / Electrical Engineering Technology or related field preferred.
	Be experienced in the use of computer-aided design and software development. (AutoCAD is preferred.)
	An excellent hands-on problem solver with at least 5 years experience.
	Be proficient in the use of a PC and Microsoft Office Suite (Access, Excel, PowerPoint, and Word).
	Be able to work with little or no supervision
	Be smart and analytical
	Be available to start as soon as possible.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrconstructioninfo5@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.",

  "description": "ICS Outsourcing Limited is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading Outsourcing Company and Business Support Solutions provider. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO to all kinds and sizes of business. Value added services to our client&rsquo;s has is our desire. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Onboarding / Implementation Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu and Alimosho / Ipaja - Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid)
Department: Monie book
Reports To: Lead, Onboarding
Level: Associate

Job Purpose


	Drive seamless onboarding of retail customers onto Monie book POS, ensuring quick adoption, strong engagement, and long-term success within the first 30&ndash;60 days.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead end-to-end customer onboarding from signup to full product adoption.
	Configure Monie book POS to fit customer operations.
	Deliver engaging training sessions to drive user confidence and usage.
	Monitor adoption metrics and proactively support at-risk customers.
	Build strong customer relationships and provide timely issue resolution.
	Document onboarding progress and ensure smooth handover to Account Managers.
	Share customer feedback to improve product and onboarding experience.


Requirements


	2&ndash;4 years experience in onboarding, customer success, or implementation (SaaS / POS preferred).
	Strong communication, training, and problem-solving skills.
	Customer-first mindset with high attention to detail.
	Ability to manage multiple onboarding projects simultaneously.
	Tech-savvy and adaptable.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their cv to:&nbsp;cekeh@icsoutsourcing.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject&nbsp;of the mail.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Location: Ikorodu and Alimosho / Ipaja - Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)
Department: Monie book

Job Purpose


	Drive seamless onboarding of retail customers onto Monie book POS, ensuring quick adoption, strong engagement, and long-term success within the first 30–60 days.

	Lead end-to-end customer onboarding from signup to full product adoption.
	Configure Monie book POS to fit customer operations.
